2122570.name: Wrangel Island
2122570.description: Wrangel Island is a survival game set in the Ice Age where players can choose to play as the various factions in the game. They can play as the herbivores which work together to survive and defend themselves from the various predators on the island. Then there are the carnivores who relentlessly hunt down the inhabitants of the island for food and may work in packs to fight even the largest of threats. Finally the players can choose to play as the humans on the island, every skill available to get the upper hand on the animals that they hunt, or hunt them.
